overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through the foggy, neon-lit Kabuki district at night. The character ascends from a dark stairwell, traverses covered walkways with passing traffic, climbs yellow stairs to an elevated plaza with digital billboards, and descends through narrow alleys.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered concrete stairwell with purple neon lighting

events.description: emerging from dark lower stairwell into artificially lit covered walkway
reaching top of stairs and entering covered pedestrian walkway

agents.ego_description: walking up concrete stairs from a dark lower level toward a lit covered walkway above

notable_agents.action: pedestrian descending the stairs toward the camera

entered.detail: wide concrete stairs ascending from darkness with metal edges
vibrant purple neon lighting illuminating the left wall of the stairwell
metal handrails along the right side of the staircase
concrete overhead structure covering the walkway at the top of the stairs
modern glass building with vertical panels visible on the left side

segments.scene_description: The character ascends a dimly lit concrete stairwell illuminated by purple neon lights on the left wall. As they climb, the environment transitions from dark and enclosed to a covered walkway with artificial lighting, where other pedestrians are visible walking in the opposite direction.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway adjacent to multi-lane road

events.description: cars passing by on the road to the right, headlights visible through fog
turning left to cross the street toward yellow stairs

agents.ego_description: walking along the covered sidewalk next to traffic, passing other pedestrians and metal barriers

notable_agents.action: car driving along the road with headlights on, passing behind metal barriers

entered.detail: large illuminated advertisement screen displaying colorful graphics
movable metal crowd control barriers lining the walkway
tall pole with bright overhead lighting illuminating the fog
asphalt road with vehicles passing by, separated by barriers

segments.scene_description: Walking along a covered concrete walkway with a digital billboard visible ahead. The path is lined with metal barriers separating pedestrians from the road where cars pass by with headlights cutting through the fog. The character continues forward before turning left to cross the street.

scene_state.functional_zone: yellow painted exterior stairway ascending to upper plaza

events.description: crossing the street and leaving the covered walkway
beginning ascent of bright yellow stairs with orange railings

agents.ego_description: crossing the road and climbing the distinctive yellow stairs to reach an upper level

entered.detail: bright yellow painted concrete stairs with heavy industrial appearance
thick orange safety railings lining both sides of the stairs
elevated highway or monorail track crossing above the street level

segments.scene_description: The character crosses the foggy street and begins ascending a prominent yellow staircase with thick orange railings. The area is open to the sky but illuminated by artificial lights, with an overpass structure visible above. Other pedestrians are scattered along the stairs and platform.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated urban plaza with digital billboards and industrial elements

events.description: entering area with scattered trash bags and people sitting on benches near a large fan

agents.ego_description: walking through the upper plaza past sitting pedestrians and industrial structures

notable_agents.action: person in purple jacket walking ahead, then turning to the right

entered.detail: open concrete platform at the top of the stairs with scattered debris
massive digital screen displaying animated advertisements with bright colors
large circular metal fan built into the building facade
large white rectangular container or trailer parked on the plaza
piles of black garbage bags scattered along the left side of the walkway

segments.scene_description: The character explores an elevated urban plaza featuring massive digital billboards, industrial ventilation fans, and a white shipping container. The area has a gritty atmosphere with trash bags piled along the path and a few people sitting on benches. The foggy night is illuminated by neon signs and streetlights.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow alleyway with food stalls and descending stairwell

events.description: descending stairs into a lower narrow passage

agents.ego_description: walking through a narrow alley past food stalls and descending stairs into a lower level

entered.detail: small illuminated food vendor booth with awning and signage
confined passage between tall building walls with limited visibility
concrete stairs leading downward into a darker lower area

segments.scene_description: The character enters a narrow alleyway with a food stall kiosk on the right, then descends a concrete stairwell into a darker, more confined lower passage. The environment shifts from the open plaza to tight, building-lined corridors with dim lighting.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through the neon-lit Kabuki district, transitioning from a confined subterranean ascent to an expansive elevated plaza before descending back into narrow urban corridors. It begins as the character climbs a dimly lit concrete stairwell bathed in purple neon, moving from the dark enclosure into a covered walkway filled with pedestrians and artificial light. As the camera follows the character across a foggy street where headlights cut through the haze, the scene opens up as they ascend a prominent yellow staircase toward an overpass. The environment then expands into a gritty elevated plaza dominated by massive digital billboards, industrial ventilation fans, and scattered trash bags under a foggy night sky. Finally, the perspective shifts from the open plaza into a tight alleyway past a food stall, descending a concrete stairwell back into a dark and confined lower passage.
